_doc: Expected ManualImport command body Curator POSTs to /api/v1/command for the importable files ONLY (ids 101+102 from get_mapping.json; the rejected 103 is filtered out). A1 PINNED LIVE 2026-05-31 (04-05-LIVE-PROBE.md, DevTools capture on the real NAS Lidarr): importMode is LOWERCASE 'move' (NOT the old [ASSUMED] capital 'Move', NOT the UI default 'copy') for the atomic same-fs hardlink (D-09); replaceExistingFiles + sendUpdatesToClient are top-level as captured; per-file carries path/artistId/albumId/albumReleaseId/trackIds/quality(full QualityModel)/indexerFlags/disableReleaseSwitching and NO downloadId (the command-queue id/priority/status fields Lidarr adds on accept are not part of the body Curator sends). Paths reflect the A2 reality: slskd lands files at staging_root/<leaf-of-remote-folder>/ (no curator-* or batchId subdir).
name: ManualImport
